rationale: Keep: the cited study is a highly relevant prior randomized telecom CRM campaign experiment on churn/plan-switching, while the citing paper explicitly frames its contribution as extending CRM campaign evaluation beyond targeted customers to social spillovers. Given this strong construct/method overlap (causal field experiments on CRM interventions, usage/churn outcomes) and a confirmed DOI-level reference match (10.1509/jmr.13.0483), this is plausibly a substantive comparison/foundation rather than an incidental mention.
